title: lytoneuron ornithopus var. pygmaeum
intro: Lytoneuron ornithopus var. pygmaeum, also known as dwarf horse purslane, is a perennial plant in the Lytoneuron genus, which is native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Lytoneuron ornithopus var. pygmaeum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Lytoneuron ornithopus var. pygmaeum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
